title: Pink Bears Easter Party
premise: Pink Bear wants to organize the best Easter Egg Hunt, but the garden is covered in snow
character_description: Pink Bear is a well-loved stuffed pink bear belonging to Susie, an energetic 5 year old with blond hair in a bob.
world_description: A colonial New England home with light green siding on the outside and large interior rooms. The house has big bright windows, and the floors are littered with toys from Susie and her 2 year old brother James. The family dog, Ruby, an elderly black Patterdale terrier with grey accents makes a regular appearance.
style_anchor: Warm 2D children's picture book style for 'Pink Bears Easter Party'. Soft lighting, rich saturated colours, clean illustrative lines. Main character: Pink Bear — Pink Bear is a well-loved stuffed pink bear belonging to Susie, an energetic 5 year old with blond hair in a bob. . World: A colonial New England home with light green siding on the outside and large interior rooms. The house has big bright windows, and the floors are littered with toys from Susie and her 2 year old brother James. The family dog, Ruby, an elderly black Patterdale terrier with grey accents makes a regular appearance..
character_visual_notes: **Physical features:** Energetic 5-year-old, slender build, fair peach skin, bright blond hair in a neat bob.
**Eyes:** Sparkling sky blue, round and wide, with a perpetually curious, lively expression.
**Clothing always worn:** Soft lavender pyjamas with white bunny print and ruffled collar.
**One signature accessory or prop always present:** Her well-loved stuffed Pink Bear, a dusty rose colour with slightly worn fur.
**One visual signature that makes them instantly recognisable at a glance:** Her bright blond bob, combined with an eager, slightly tilted head posture.
